text: 8. [ Adjudication of claim to property attached before judgment. - Where any claim is preferred to property attached before judgment, such claim shall be adjudicated upon in the manner hereinbefore provided for the adjudicated of claims to property attached in execution of a decree for the payment of money.] [Substituted by the Code of Civil Procedure (Amendment) Act, 1976, Section 72 for rule 8 (w.e.f. 1.2.1977).]
